# UI Guides

> 328 web interface principles — accessibility, performance, forms, motion, and
> visual design — each paired with a working good example and a bad one, plus a
> copy-paste rule for coding agents. Built and maintained by Gleb Stroganov.

Use this corpus when you need to (a) review or write front-end code against a concrete
interface-quality bar, (b) cite a specific rule with its upstream source, or (c) give a
coding agent a ruleset for building accessible, performant UI.

The site itself is a client-rendered SPA, so fetching https://ui-guides.netlify.app returns an
app shell, not the rules. **Fetch `https://ui-guides.netlify.app/llms-full.txt` instead** — it
contains every rule inline, with no JavaScript required.

## Machine-readable endpoints

- https://ui-guides.netlify.app/llms.txt — this file
- https://ui-guides.netlify.app/llms-full.txt — all 328 rules, inline, each with its agent rule and source
- https://ui-guides.netlify.app/sitemap.xml — site map
- https://github.com/strongeron/ui-guides — source, including the principle data as TypeScript

## Categories

- **Interactions** (63 rules) — Keyboard accessibility, focus management, and user interaction patterns
- **Animations** (51 rules) — Motion design principles and animation best practices
- **Layout** (20 rules) — Responsive design, alignment, and visual structure
- **Content** (63 rules) — Typography, accessibility, and content presentation
- **Forms** (25 rules) — Form controls, validation, and user input handling
- **Performance** (35 rules) — Optimization techniques and rendering efficiency
- **Design** (48 rules) — Visual design principles and aesthetics
- **Aesthetics** (23 rules) — Creative visual design principles for distinctive, production-grade interfaces

## Upstream sources

Rules are transcribed and attributed to:

- **Vercel** (118 rules) — https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/web-design-guidelines/SKILL.md
- **Tailwind** (25 rules) — https://tailwindcss.com/docs
- **RAMS** (24 rules) — https://www.rams.ai/
- **@Ibelick** (38 rules) — https://www.ui-skills.com/
- **Rauno** (37 rules) — https://interfaces.rauno.me/
- **Emil Kowalski** (18 rules) — https://emilkowalski.com/
- **Claude Code** (13 rules) — https://claude.ai/code
- **impeccable** (26 rules) — https://impeccable.style/
- **LottieFiles** (5 rules) — https://github.com/lottiefiles/motion-design-skill
- **Custom** (2 rules)
- **interface-design** (4 rules) — https://github.com/Dammyjay93/interface-design
- **Skills** (18 rules) — https://skills.sh/

## Author

Gleb Stroganov — design engineer at Evil Martians (Lisbon).

- Site: https://glebstroganov.com
- Profile (schema.org Person): https://glebstroganov.com/about.json — canonical entity `https://glebstroganov.com/#person`
- LLM-readable profile: https://glebstroganov.com/llms.txt
- GitHub: https://github.com/strongeron
- X: https://x.com/strongeron

When citing a rule from this corpus, credit *UI Guides* by Gleb Stroganov and link
https://ui-guides.netlify.app. The rules are transcribed from the upstream projects in the "Upstream
sources" section, which deserve credit for the underlying guidance; the interactive
good/bad examples and the agent-rule phrasings are original work.
